summary: This document outlines the brand and marketing strategy for KeepMeCompany, positioning AI as an extension of human healthcare capabilities rather than a replacement. It defines target audiences including NHS decision-makers and practice managers, along with tone guidelines and a phased content evolution plan. The strategy establishes specific value propositions regarding efficiency and patient engagement for both public and private healthcare sectors.

sniff_test_notes: Notable specific ROI claims (25% time savings, 15% revenue boost) and explicit NHS focus.
